import React from 'react'; import { Section, SectionTitle, SkillsGrid, SkillCategory, SkillTitle, SkillList, SkillItem, ExperienceTimeline, TimelineItem, TimelineCompany, TimelineRole, TimelinePeriod, TimelineDescription, CertificationGrid, CertificationCard, CertificationTitle, CertificationProvider, CertificationYear, } from './StyledComponents'; // Assuming styled components are used const About = () => { return (
Skills Technical Skills Python, R, SQL, JavaScript Docker, Git, FastAPI PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Neo4j Full-Stack Development Business & Strategy AI Strategy & Roadmap Development Stakeholder Management Go-to-Market Strategy Salesforce CRM Market Analysis & Positioning Specialized Domains Automotive Analytics ESG & Sustainability IoT & Embedded Systems Enterprise SaaS Solutions Technical Training & Education
Experience AVL Analytical Technologies GmbH Business Development Manager July 2024 – Present | Neuss, Germany Driving global business development for cloud-based automotive data analytics solutions. Bridging the gap between advanced AI/ML technologies and business value creation for OEM and Tier 1 supplier clients across Europe, North America, and Asia. syenah GmbH Business Development Manager July 2023 – June 2024 | Germany Spearheaded go-to-market strategies for AI-powered ESG risk intelligence platforms. Partnered with engineering teams to deliver machine learning-driven sustainability analysis solutions tailored for enterprise compliance markets. Expotech Industries Founder & CEO April 2020 – December 2022 | Johannesburg, South Africa Founded a consulting firm specializing in business development and AI solutions. Designed and delivered training programs on AI, machine learning, and data science for corporate clients and universities, emphasizing practical applications in business contexts.
Education & Certifications MBA, Technology Management & Sustainability Frankfurt School of Finance & Management 2022 – 2024 Data Science & AI Engineering Bootcamp Le Wagon 2024 Deep Learning Specialization DeepLearning.AI (Coursera) 2022 Machine Learning Stanford University (Andrew Ng) 2020 McKinsey Forward Program McKinsey & Company 2025
